rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM GORDON KAUPP VS. JIANFENG CHEN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS , CGC-15-546977 WITH CASE CGC-16-550777
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 15, 2017, line 4. PLAINTIFF WILLIAM KAUPP, BETH FEINBERG MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS , CGC-15-546977 WITH CASE CGC-16-550777 GRANTED. Actions are consolidated for discovery and trial only. Any party may bring an action to bifurcate Chen's claims against the broker and the seller. = (501/AJR)
